title: DISCOVERY - 211info
text: EMERGENCE COTTAGE GROVE DISCOVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists those seeking Oregon DMV certificates, occupational driver's licenses, court or corrections requirements resolution, DUII and DMV requirements fulfillment, or other diversion purposes. 710 Adams Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Individuals who are seeking a solution for required treatment for DUII diversion or other diversion Hours: Group hours: Tuesday 4pm-6pm Email (541) 767-3057 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 767-3057 After Hours Emergency (541) 607-4821 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: OHP, private insurance, sliding scale DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Diversion Programs DUI Offender Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EMERGENCE COTTAGE GROVE
